title: • Ties gameplay engagement with thematic content.
content:
• Ties gameplay engagement with thematic content.

📜 2. Expanding Weekly Exposition – New Thematic Elements

📜 Each section now includes:
✔ A Narrative Charge (the central dramatic tension or theme of the week).
✔ A Zodiac Influence (a thematic astrological association).
✔ A Tarot Card (a symbolic representation of the weekly lesson).
✔ A Canterbury Character (A Satirical Figure from Chaucer’s Work).

Example: Week 6 – The Fragmentation of Narrative in Modernism
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 165 (chunk 165/555)
